title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin builds out Anthropic's playbook for Claude Code in large codebases by constructing a complete "AI Layer" harness including CLAUDE.md hierarchy, self-improving hooks, scoped skills, LSP, MCP, subagents, and plugins. The core insight is that the surrounding infrastructure matters more than the model itself for effective AI-assisted coding at scale.
